---
title: "Anish Deshpande"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: ../Images_and_Attachments/Profile_Pic.jpg
  links:
    - icon: trophy
      text: cricket stats
      href: https://cricclubs.com/CCF/viewPlayer.do?playerId=98580&clubId=4617
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/anishd2022
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      url: "mailto:animaniusa@gmail.com"
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anishd13
---

## About

Anish Deshpande is an incoming MS in Artificial Intelligence student at Columbia University with a focus in Finance and Operations. He completed his Bachelor's in Statistics and Data Science at UCLA in 2026. His passion for data science is driven by his desire for optimality and efficiency in processes. While Anish loves to apply statistics in his daily life, he primarily enjoys the intersection of sports and data. He currently works part time for the Bay Area's Major League Cricket Team, the San Francisco Unicorns.

Anish has played cricket since the age of 9, and gone on to play at the professional level for Minor League Cricket and regional level for USA Cricket. In his free time, you may find Anish playing a cricket game, going for a run, sports betting, reading, or spending time with his family in the Bay Area.

## Education

Columbia University \| New York, NY \| M.S in AI (concentration in Finance + Operations) \| Sept 2026 - Dec 2027

University of California, Los Angeles \| Los Angeles, CA \| B.S in Statistics and Data Science \| Sept 2022 - June 2026

Basis Independent Silicon Valley High School \| San Jose, CA \| Aug 2018 - June 2022

[Resume](../PDFs/Resume_2025_2026.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
